title: iris collina
intro: Iris collina, also known as the western iris, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the iris family (Iridaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Iris collina can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
